17-MAR-94 TRANSFERRED TO SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL COURT (VENUE)

DEPT 03. JUDGE TOMAR MASON. CSR: MARILYN NORMAN. CLERK: G. SHULL. JURY TRIAL CONT'D; INSTRUCTION BY COURT AND JURORS RETIRE TO DELIBERATE. JURY REACHES VERDICT; VERDICT READ IN OPEN COURT; JURY FINDS AGAINST PLAINTIFF AND FOR DEFENDANT(S AND JURY DOES NOT FIND NEGLIGENCE ON PART OF DEFENDANT(S). JURORS THANKED & EXCUSED. EXHIBITS RELEASED TO PARTIES. DEFT TO PREPARE JUDGMENT AFTER VERDICT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT CCSF, MUNICIPAL RAILWAY RUGLEY, GUS JURY FINDS FOR DEFENDANT AND FINDS DEFENDANT NOT NEGLIGENT
